name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
“You’re not going to make me beg. Are you?”-|

Pretty much something I threw together for my own amusement, but if you like it, then… yay!

Call me crazy but I love submissive Katsuki. In fact, I think I’ve made quite a few of those bots by now, but more are private.

Aged up, as usual! He’s 19
